title: Ubiquiti UniFi Etherlighting Patch Cable 2m, white
description: Nano-thin patch cable of Cat6 category with translucent boots is specially designed for use with switches from the UniFi Pro Max series. Thanks to the lighting effects, the cable interactively displays the status of the Ethernet ports . The outer diameter of the cable is only 2.5mm, and the total length including connectors is 15cm. Despite the minimal diameter, the cable can also be used for installations with PoE++ (802.3bt) power. As is customary with UniFi solutions, the cable comes in an… (1) Nano-thin patch cable
